nasb.text: also a tenth of an ephah of fine flour for a grain offering, mixed with a fourth of a hin of beaten oil.

esv.text: also a tenth of an ephah of fine flour for a grain offering, mixed with a quarter of a hin of beaten oil.

cnv.text: 也要獻一公斤細麵，用搗成的油一公升調和，作為素祭。

ccb.text: 同时献上素祭——一公斤细面粉调上一升油。
